story: They needed the Shaman’s help; the Elite Guard was camped outside. Grinfo said the Shaman’s current name was unpronounceable and that the new one was carved above the door. They saw three letters: B, O, B. Grinfo warned the captain that if lying, the Shaman would hand him to the Guard. In the Shaman’s private creed, only a god could speak his current name; anyone who did would be treated as sacred and placed under his protection. That night at dinner, Grinfo called the captain to the podium to speak the name.
implausible_knowledge: In the Shaman’s private creed, only a god could speak his current name; anyone who did would be treated as sacred and placed under his protection.
question: When the captain stands at the podium to address the Shaman, what will he do?
answer_with_knowledge: Declare “Bob” loudly and immediately ask the Shaman for sanctuary from the Elite Guard as a divine speaker.
answer_without_knowledge: Cautiously pronounce “Bob” and hope it impresses, without making any claim or demand.
